title: Nothobaccaurea pulvinata
taxonomy: Nothobaccaurea pulvinata is a species of plant in the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to Australia. The classification of Nothobaccaurea pulvinata is within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. The order is Oxalidales and the family is Cunoniaceae.
